title: C# 反射反模式：8 个会伤害你应用的错误
summary_angle: 反射滥用的8种具体模式——从热路径查找到忽略源生成器——及其对应修复方案
core_conclusion: 反射是工具，不是拐杖。缓存元数据、使用编译委托、标注 AOT 注解、让源生成器在编译期解决运行期问题，才是正确姿势。
narrative_flow: 问题呈现 → 根因分析 → 修复模式 → 现代替代方案

information_blocks.label: 热路径
information_blocks.anchor: Anti-Pattern 1: GetProperty in every loop iteration = metadata lookup every time

information_blocks.label: 编译委托
information_blocks.anchor: Anti-Pattern 3: Expression.Lambda.Compile() → near-native speed after one-time cost

information_blocks.label: [UnsafeAccessor]
information_blocks.anchor: Anti-Pattern 6: zero-overhead private member access, AOT-safe, .NET 8+

information_blocks.label: 源生成器
information_blocks.anchor: Anti-Pattern 8: source generators replace reflection at compile time

comic_style_reason: analysis type → american-comic: conflict-driven contrast between misuse patterns and correct alternatives suits graphic-novel style with bold outlines and halftone tension
main_subject: A developer character holding a cracked magnifying glass (reflection metaphor), surrounded by four warning signs labeled with the four information blocks, each sign showing a trap being defused
subject_action: Developer caught mid-stumble, four pitfall panels arranged in a 2x2 grid beside the main figure, each panel depicting a contrast between the broken pattern and the fix
composition: wide cover 2.35:1, main character left-center, 2x2 info grid right side, speed lines and halftone dots throughout, heavy black ink outlines
background: dark blueprint/code grid, subtle concentric impact lines
style: american-comic graphic novel, bold black ink outlines, halftone dots, limited 3-color palette (black, white, electric blue accent)
color: Black ink dominant, electric blue (#0066FF) for impact accents, white backgrounds for panel cells, yellow (#FFD700) for warning signs
forbidden_elements: real code snippets rendered as image text
visible_text_allowance: Maximum 4 labels in Chinese: 热路径、编译委托、[UnsafeAccessor]、源生成器 — each max 6 characters or 1 technical name; no main title, no English slogans
final_prompt: American comic book cover illustration, wide format 2.35:1 aspect ratio. A C# developer character holding a cracked magnifying glass stumbling over a pitfall, drawn in bold black ink outlines and halftone dots. Four comic panels arranged in a 2x2 grid on the right side of the image, each panel showing a warning sign. Panel labels in Chinese: top-left '热路径', top-right '编译委托', bottom-left '[UnsafeAccessor]', bottom-right '源生成器'. Each panel shows a small figure falling into a trap on the left half and a fixed/correct pattern (shield or light beam) on the right half. Electric blue (#0066FF) for impact lines and accents, yellow for warning signs, dark blueprint grid background with subtle concentric impact lines. No fake UI, no fake charts, no fake terminals, no English text except the single technical term [UnsafeAccessor]. Bold graphic novel style, halftone texture throughout.
